title: RAW Projects continues shaping the local industry with innovation and quality
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Being nominated for Best...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Being nominated for Best Engineering & Manufacturing Company in the Best of George Awards is a proud moment for RAW Projects.


> This recognition not only validates our commitment to excellence, but also highlights our deep connection to George and its thriving business community and delivering superior steel solutions that benefit businesses and residents alike.


Our historyR.A.W. Projects was founded in 1976 by Rhoderick Simpson, whose vision laid the foundation for one of South Africa’s leading structural steel and sheet metal manufacturing enterprises. Today, his sons - Alistair, William, and Andrew - carry forward his legacy, continuously growing and evolving the business.

We specialise in steelR.A.W. Projects specialises in steel building construction, decorative steel panels, custom-designed trailers, and CNC cutting and bending. With a strong commitment to precision, innovation, and craftsmanship, we deliver high quality solutions tailored to client needs, shaping the local industry and beyond and ensuring efficiency and cost-effectiveness.

A complete solutionWe offer a complete solution - from design and manufacturing to installation - all under one roof. With strong partnerships, decades of experience, and a proven track record of successful projects, we continue to shape the local industry with innovative, high-quality workmanship.

Cutting-edge technologyAt R.A.W. Projects, we maintain our leadership by investing in cutting-edge technology, including CNC laser cutting and advanced fabrication techniques, ensuring precision and quality. More importantly, we prioritise the development of local talent by partnering with institutions like Africa Skills Training College, giving aspiring artisans hands-on experience in the steel industry. By nurturing skills within George, we strengthen our workforce while ensuring sustainable growth for both our business and the local economy.

Add your voteAs a proudly local company, we take pride in contributing to the region’s industrial growth.

We invite you to add your vote in the final stretch of this competition and help us claim our rightful title: Best Engineering & Manufacturing Company.

Cast your vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
